items.name_en: Goyard 💕 MORVAN Briefcase Lightweight, slim, practical, and elegantly designed, it is an ideal choice for both daily and professional use. It features a zip closure, two round leather handles for comfortable carrying, and an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder or crossbody wear.

items.name_en: Goyard 2025 Limited Edition Goyard takes us on a stroll through a ever-changing, blooming garden, enjoying a double sensory and emotional experience. The SAINT LOUIS Medium Bag features two unique GOYARDINE canvas colors inspired by the bright tones of linen flowers, better highlighting the dual-use inspiration in the original SAINT LOUIS design.

items.name_cn:
Goyard Belvédère|| Suede New Arrival
❤️The classic traits of the Belvédère||: simple, elegant, lightweight, and practical. The single narrow strap buckle flows smoothly through the metal ring, opening and closing with ease; the leather trim highlights the bag's outline with lines, and the leather lining on the flap makes the silhouette more three-dimensional. The Belvédère|| features three interior pockets for organizing daily essentials, and a detachable shoulder strap allows it to be worn as a crossbody or shoulder bag. Its clever design is a new interpretation of Goyard's traditional craftsmanship, while also showcasing an ultimate minimalist style and sports fashion spirit 👻
Medium Size: 28*19*7.5Cm
🔍020183-1

items.name_cn:
Goyard Bohème Hobo~
Goyard HOBO is the ultimate in relaxed style! A minimalist, casual bag perfect for daily commuting. Lightweight and soft, it offers surprisingly spacious capacity to hold all your essentials. Features an extended comfortable leather handle and a shoulder strap long enough for an underarm carry. Includes a detachable pouch—truly a dream bag.
Size:32 cm x 13.5 cm x 34 cm
🔍03687655..
